summary: Bug fix verified: Image branding is now NON-BLOCKING. Car uploads ALWAYS succeed even if branding fails. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend correctly handles preview failures with graceful fallbacks. No 'Failed to generate branded preview' error appears.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/cars with valid Pexels URL succeeds with TruVant branding
Backend: POST /api/cars with invalid URL still succeeds (non-blocking branding)
Backend: POST /api/cars with Google Drive URL works (branding attempted)
Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview with valid URL returns branded image
Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview with invalid URL returns fallback (NOT 500 error)
Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview with inaccessible Google Drive returns fallback
Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview with Google Drive URL works or returns fallback
Backend: Google Drive URL /file/d/FILE_ID/view converts to uc?export=view format
Backend: Google Drive URL /open?id=FILE_ID converts correctly
Backend: Non-Google URLs remain unchanged
Backend: Preview endpoint NEVER returns 'Failed to generate branded preview' error
Frontend: Admin login works with admin@truvant.com / Admin@123
Frontend: Add Car modal opens with Preview button
Frontend: Preview button generates branded preview for valid URLs
Frontend: Preview button shows fallback (car emoji) for invalid URLs - NO error toast
Frontend: Car submission with valid URL succeeds with branding
Frontend: Car submission with invalid URL STILL succeeds (non-blocking)
Frontend: Modal closes after successful submission
Frontend: Created car appears in inventory table
Frontend: No 'Failed to generate branded preview' error appears
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly implemented: Branding is now NON-BLOCKING in create_car() endpoint (lines 497-582)
asyncio.wait_for() with 30s timeout prevents branding from blocking car creation
Preview endpoint (lines 947-1009) always returns success=True with branding_applied boolean
Frontend handleSubmitCar() correctly handles both branded and non-branded responses
Frontend generateBrandedPreview() shows toast.info() for fallbacks instead of error
Google Drive URL conversion uses drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=FILE_ID format
seed_data_creation: Test cars (TEST_Frontend, TEST_Invalid) created during testing were cleaned up. Inventory restored to 10 cars.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for 'Failed to generate branded preview' error verified. Key changes: 1) Branding is NON-BLOCKING - car ALWAYS saves even if branding fails. 2) Preview endpoint NEVER returns 500 - always returns success with branding_applied boolean. 3) Frontend shows appropriate messages based on branding status. Test with: valid Pexels URL (https://images.pexels.com/photos/170811/pexels-photo-170811.jpeg), Google Drive URL (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KlxVXrryIshPVXXyZe2tvUFqoyzrzRlz/view?usp=sharing), invalid URL (https://drive.google.com/file/d/invalid_file_id_12345/view).

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Image branding was BLOCKING car uploads. When branding failed (e.g., for Google Drive URLs), the entire car creation would fail with 'Failed to generate branded preview' error.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: 1) Made branding NON-BLOCKING with asyncio.wait_for() and 30s timeout. 2) Car ALWAYS saves - branding failures just log warnings and use original URL. 3) Preview endpoint returns graceful fallbacks (success=True, branding_applied=False) instead of 500 errors. 4) Frontend shows appropriate toast messages based on branding status.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested with: valid Pexels URL (branding applied), invalid Google Drive URL (car saved with original URL), inaccessible URL (car saved with fallback). No 'Failed to generate branded preview' error appeared in any scenario.
